content.text: I've been doing parts work for two years — IFS, mostly — and I'm genuinely grateful for it, it's given me a lot of language. But somewhere along the way I went from being someone who just... acted, who was in flow, to someone who convenes a town hall every time I need to decide what to have for lunch. *slight smile* And I'm wondering if your approach does something different with that, or if I'm just going to end up with more parts to track.
